_comment: Single source for the silicon-ref -> Zephyr SoC-select Kconfig symbol. The symbol is COMPUTED as socSymbolPrefix + ref.upper().replace(':','_'); knownSilicon is the allowlist of host SoCs that get a symbol (accelerators such as deepx:dx:m1 do not). Consumed by scripts/alp_project.py:silicon_to_kconfig(); coverage gated by scripts/validate_metadata.py.
